ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job position held by the employee */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office where the employee works */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started working */,
  "salary" REAL /* Current salary of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Employee's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Employee's contact phone number */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the employee works */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of employment contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the office */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Office's contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Office's contact email address */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office manager */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the office location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the job position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the job responsibilities */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the position */,
  "level" TEXT /* Seniority level of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee to whom the salary belongs */,
  "amount" REAL /* Salary amount for the employee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary became effective */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the salary is paid */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of salary payment */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Any additional bonus amount */,
  "overtime" REAL /* Overtime pay rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the employee */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person conducting the review */,
  "goal_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the goals set during the review */,
  "action_plan" TEXT /* Action plan for improvement or development */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., Health, Retirement) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benefit (if applicable) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Name of the benefit provider */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the benefit to the employee */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Coverage details of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaves" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee requesting the leave */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., Sick, Vacation) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the leave request (e.g., Approved, Pending) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the leave request */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the leave */,
  "hours" INTEGER /* Number of hours taken as leave */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaves_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaves_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
